## Proposed Changes
Describe the API modifications:
- What REST endpoints were added or changed?
- What issue does this PR resolve? (E.g., Closes #35)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Database migration or schema update
- [ ] Security refinement / Dependency update

## API & Database Details
- **New Endpoints:** `METHOD /path` (include request/response samples)
- **New Environment Variables:** List keys that need to be added to `.env`.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have verified that no hardcoded credentials or API keys exist in my code.
- [ ] I have written unit/integration tests validation my API endpoints.
- [ ] All tests pass successfully when executing `npm test`.
- [ ] I have updated the swagger OpenAPI docs in `README.md` if applicable.
